login.subtitle: Sign in with WhatsApp
login.qrInstructions: WhatsApp → Linked Devices → Link a Device → Scan QR
login.pairingInstructions: WhatsApp → Linked Devices → Link with phone number
login.enterCodeOnPhone: Enter this code on your phone
login.qrDescription: Generate a QR code and scan it with your phone. The dashboard opens after you connect.
login.pairingDescription: Enter your WhatsApp number — a code will arrive on your phone to enter here.
login.pairingSessionNote: Format: 923166723252 (no + or spaces). Old linked account is cleared first. Enter the code only on that same phone.
login.footer: No data or routes are accessible without a channel link

errors.pairingFailed: Pairing could not start — check the number
